titleStmt.title: SII 24.136: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 136. (A.R. No. 61 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of the village Tiruvāyppāḍinallūr, made tax free, for special worship and offerings to the god on the day of the Daivattarayaṉ festival by the gōpālas who had proprietory rights over Vaḷḷuvappāḍi-nāḍu in Karikālakaṇṇavaḷanāḍu. Mentions the Śrīkāryam officer Kavaittalai-uḍaiyār. The record is dated in the 6th year of śrī Vīrarājēndra which is a surname of Kulōttuṅga III with whose praśasti the record begins. The details of date viz. 6th year, Mīṉa, ba. 6, Monday, Kēṭṭai, regularly correspond to A.D. 1184, March 5, Monday; ·58; f.d.n. ·10.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . puyalvāyttu vaḷam perukap poyyāta nāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ceyal vāytta tirumakaḷuñ ceyamakaḷuñ ciṟantu vāḻa veṇmati poṟkuṭai viḷaṅka vel ventaraṭi vaṇaṅka maṇmaṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa maṉu niti(t) taḻait toṅkac cakkaramuñ ceṅkolun tikkaṉaittuñ cela naṭāttik kaṟpakattār kayal tāṅkip poṟ pamainta muṭipuṉaintu cempoṉ
viraciṅṅāsaṉattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripaṟmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirarājentra tevaṟku yāṇṭu 6 Āṟāvatu miṉa nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu ṣaṭṭiyum tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa keṭṭai nāḷ karikāla kaṉṉavaḷanāṭṭu vaḷḷuvappāṭi nāṭu kāṇiyuṭaiya śrīkopālarom Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷukku taiyvattarayaṉ(t)
tirunāḷil perumāḷum pirāṭṭimārum periya tiru maṇṭapatte Eḻuntaruḷi tiru mañcaṉam pukkaruḷac cāntu kastūri puḻuku neyyum kaṟpūramuñ cantaṉamum kuṅkumamum Uḷḷiṭṭa cāttuppaṭikaḷukkum tirukkaṇṇāmaṭaikum peruntiruva mutukkum taḷikaic ciṟappukkum Appa Amutukkum veṇṭum tiruppoṉakappaḻa Aricikkum paruppamutukkum Uppamutu miḷakamutu ciraka Amutu caṟkarai Amutu kaṇṭacaṟ
karai Amutu Iḷaniramutu teṅkāyamutu tayiramutu kuṭukuṭuppai Aṭaikkāyamutu Ilaiyamutu tiruppaḷḷittāma muḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉaṅkaḷukkum Uttama Uttamap paṭi celkaikku nāṅkaḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka Iṉṉāṭṭurkaḷil Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa tiruvāy ppāṭi nallūrp pottakappaṭi nilam 2 100 5 10- li Iṉṉilam Irunūṟṟaim patiṟṟu veliyum naṉcey puṉcey payiṟ ceṉṟu varukiṟa nilattukku Iṉṉāṭṭu Oṭṭiṉa paṭi
yāl vanta kaṭamai śrī paṇṭāratte cantirātittavarai Iṟukkak kaṭavomāka koyiṟ cikāriyaṅ kavaittalaiyuṭaiyārum tiruppati śrī vaiṣṇavaril kuravaiceri tiruvaraṅka paṭṭārum kuṭavāyiṟ periyakoyiṟ piriyarum katavāy maṅkalattu viṟṟiruntā nampiyum Iṭavai tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇa nampiyum ṅ śrīkurukūr nampiyum toṭṭattu Arumāritātarum tiruccittirakūṭatātarum Iruṅkaṇṭi tirukkuṟuṅ
kuṭi nampiyum Iṭavai Irāca mahentranampiyum ciṟupuḷḷur śrī caṭakopapiriyarum kaṉtāṭait tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇa nampiyum śrīvaiṣṇavak kaṇkāṇik kaṇakkuk kiraṉūr vaṇcaṭakopa tātaṉum koyiṟkaṇakkup paḷḷikoṇṭāṉ Uttamaṉāṉa Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap piriyaṉum kuṟumpiluṭaiyāṉ karuṇākarappiriyanum Ivvaṉaivaṟkum Ivvūr Ellaik kāṭṭit tiruvāḻik kallu nāṭṭivittuk kuṭutta maikku Ivvūrkku koyiṟṟa
mar kaṭamai Iṟukkumiṭattu Ivvūr Oṭṭiṉapaṭiyāl vaṉta kaṭamai Eṅkaḷ nāṭṭu Ūrkaḷile Ēṟiṭṭu viḻukkāṭu Iṭṭu viḻukkāṭṭuppaṭiyāl van=ta kaṭamai Iṉṉā mutalikaḷukku nāṅkaḷe Iṟukka kaṭavomāvum . Ippaṭiye cantirātittavaṟ cellak kaṭavatākaccammatittut tiruvāyppāṭi nallūr tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka viṭṭamaikkuk kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom vaḷḷuvappāṭi nāṭu kā
ṇi Uṭaiya śrī kopālarom . Iṉṉāṭṭurkaḷukkuc camainta tuṟaiyūruṭaiyāṉ caṅkaraṉ celvaṉāṉa Amarakoṉum Ottaṉ kūṭṭeriyāṉa Aḷakaikkoṉum periñcalūruṭaiyāṉ Ārāvamutu kāvaṉāṉa kovattarāyaṉum maṇavāḷa nampi yāṉa pala maṇṭalak koṉum teṟ kūṭalāṉ puttāṟṟaṅkaraiyuṭaiyāṉ cuntaṉ celvaṉāṉa vaḷḷuvappāṭi nampiyum vaṭukaṉ nam
piyāṉa karikāla kaṉṉavaḷanāṭṭuk koṉum pirampil Uṭaiyāṉ muṭikoṇṭāṉ Ulakaḷanta coḻakkoṉum maṇavāḷaṉ teṟṟiyāṉa Āyira vallavak koṉum kuṉṟaṇi Uṭaiyāṉ naṉta Uṭaiyāṉ Uyyavantā(ṉ)ṉum vāḻkai tiruppe coṟaṉ taṇikaṉum murukuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ piḷḷaiyum peruvallamuṭaiyāṉ Iḷaiyāṉ comaṉum Eḻuvāṉ coṟaṉum kaṇṇaṉ Ūruṭaiyāṉ maṇavāḷaṉ
celvak koṉum kaṭuṅkarai Uṭaiyāṉ koḻuntaṉ kopālapiḷḷaiyum Aru moḻi nallūruṭaiyāṉmpala nampiyāna Āṭkoṇṭakoṉṉum tirumaḻapāṭi cuṉtaṉum na nattamuṭaiyāṉ kūttan maṇavāḷak koṉum nirutaṉ pirampaṉum nāḻaluṭaiyāṉa teṉntoḻiyāṉa nālūr nāṭṭuk koṉum koṭṭaiyūruṭaiyān periyāḷ tiruvaraṅkakoṉum tūṅkāṉai Uṭaiyāṉ cemaṉ puku vāyaṉāṉa pakaiyāta kaṇṭakkoṉum nampi AṟappaḷḷiyumRead piḷḷaiyumpirāntaka nallūruṭai
yāṉa tiruvaṉ kaliyaṉum cirampa yāṉa piccaṉ Iḷaiyāṉāṉa vaṇṭuvarāpatik ko ṉum māyilaṅkai yuṭaiyāṉ kallaṉ Atikaiyarāyaṉum veṇmaṇip pāṭiyuṭaiyāṉ vempaṉ tiruvaṉum piṟaiyompi yuṭaiyāṉa celvaṉ nakkaṉum toṟkalaiyuṭaiyāṉ nāṭṭāṉ Iḷaiyāṉum pullāliyuṭaiyāṉ teṉ Atikai yarāyaṉum maṇiyaṉ kuṟicciyuṭaiyāṉ cuṟṟipaṭṭāṉum Alappiliyuṭaiyāṉ Ottaṉ cūṟṟiyum teṉṉūruṭaiyāṉ veṉkāṭaṉ te
ṟṟiyum pakavati maṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Aṟaṅkāttāṉṉum Avaṉimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Aṭippirampaṉum Ūti mantai Uṭaiyāṉ nicaṉ teṟṟiyum varampiyuṭaiyāṉ Aracaṉ peṟṟāṉṉum karumpaṉuṭaiyāṉ Ampalavaṉ tiruvaṉum celamuṭaiyāṉ coṟṟaṉ kaṇakkaṉum taṇṭuṟai Uṭaiyāṉ koḻuṉtaṉ kovintarāyaṉum maruttūruṭaiyāṉ Araṅkaṉ virāṉtakoṉum pullaṅkuṭaiyāṉ maṟavaṉ ciṅkaḷānta kkoṉum ciṟu natta muṭaiyāṉ malai tirumaḻapāṭiyum
cāttaṉuṭaiyāṉ kaṇakkaṉ kaṇappāṭiyuṭaiyāṉ periyāṉ teṟṟiyum kuṇamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ kecavaṉ nampiyum pūṉtuṟaiyuṭaiyāṉ ciṅkaṉ celvaṉāṉa kulottuṅkakoṉum māyilaṅkaiyuṭaiyāṉ malai tiruvaṉum nāvalūruṭaiyāṉ periyāḷ Ukavātiyum kaḷḷinattamuṭaiyāṉ kumpiṭaṉ kāḷiyum vallamuṭai yāṉ ceṉtaṉ cuṉtaṉāṉa tiruvāḷakkoṉum Eḻuvaṉ Iḷamaik koṉṉum
kuruviyūruṭaiyāṉ vaṭukaṉ maṇṭalak koṉum tillaivāṇa nallūruṭaiyāṉ celvaṉ cuntara coḻakkoṉum nampivaṭukaṉum kūttāṭu nallūruṭaiyāṉ kallaṉ viḻumiyatevakkoṉum tevaṉ Aṟaṅkāttāṉum piraṇṭai nallūruṭaiyāṉ koṟṟaṉ cāttaṉum muttāṉ paṭṭaṉum karikālanallūruṭaiyāṉ coṟaṉ Oḷiyan ṉum ciṟukarikāli Uṭaiyāṉ tirumaḻapāṭi Uṭaiyāṉ centāmarai kaṇṇaṉum
kaḷattuṭaiyāṉ tiruvaṉ Uyyavantāṉum naṭukalūruṭaiyāṉ mummuṭi coḻakkoṉum turattūruṭaiyāṉ Ārā Amutukāvaṉum ciṟu kaṇṇaṉūruṭaiyāṉ tevaṉ cuṉtaṉum kaḷḷikkuṭiyuṭaiyāṉ Uṭaiyāṉ tiruvāyppāṭik koṉum celvaṉ Aracanāṉa tiruvāyk kulakkoṉum tiruvaraṅkamāṉi puliyaṉum Aiyyāṟaṉ yirācāciriyakkoṉum puliyūruṭaiyāṉ teṟṟi Irāmaṉum
ciṟuvayallūruṭaiyāṉ catti tāmotirakkoṉum pulvāykuṭiyuṭaiyāṉ Aracu teṟṟiyum Iṭaikkuṭi Uṭaiyāṉ viracoḻakkoṉum Ayaṅkayamuṭaiyāṉ piccaṉ Iraṇṭāyirakkoṉum mātevi tāḻiyūr Uṭaiyāṉ caṅkaraṉ celvaṉum putteṟṟaṅ karaiyuṭaiyāṉ malaitirumaḻapāṭiyum periyāṉ tirumaḻapāṭiyum mātevi Uṭaiyāṉ kāṭeri coṟaṉum varakūruṭaiyāṉ vaḷḷuvappāṭikoṉum
valai Uṭaippuṭaiyāṉ Utaiyaṉ tiruviṅkaikkoṉum Ārācciuṭaiyāṉ A Uṭaiyāṉum ṭam piṟaiyuṭaiyāṉ coti tiruveṇṇāval koṉum ceṉṉa maṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ vempaṉ meḻukiyakkoṉu maṉṉamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ cāttaṉ mativāraṇamum ciṟukaḷḷikkuṭaiyāṉ vicaiyapālakkoṉum kiḷiyūruṭaiyāṉ Ulakaṉ nāyaṉnāṉ Aṇṭarāyaṉum tiruvāyppāṭi nellūruṭaiyāṉ kāru Ili
l Araṅkaṉāṉa tiruvāyppāṭi konṉum kallaṉ toṇṭaṉāṉa kovattarāyaṉum Arumoḻi nallūruṭaiyāṉ (m) celvaṉ ṉilaṉum nampi vaṭukaṉum peruṅkaṇṇa ṉūruṭaiyāṉ Aḻakiya maṇavāḷakkoṉum cirākavakkoṉum Irājamahendra(ra)k koṉum śrī nārasiṅkak koṉum pirampilluṭaiyāṉ teṟṟiyāṉ nativaṉap peru māḷum kallaiyāṉ vaṇṭuvarāpatikkoṉum ciṅkaḷāntakaṉallūruṭaiya maṟavaṉ paṭṭaṉum
Intak kalveṭṭu śrīvai
ṣṇavar rakṣai ....
Inta vaḷḷuvappāṭi ṉāṭṭukku
camaitta maṅkalamuṭaiyā
ṉ kallaṉ Ulakaṉṉāna ma
ṇṇai koṇṭa coḻakko
ṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu .
Ippaṭikku Ivai cuṉtaṉ celvaṉā
ṉa vaḷḷuvappāṭi nampi Eḻuttu
intat tiruvāyppāṭi nallūr
Ūrk kaṇakku Uttamaṉ Aḻa
kiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷāṉa
ci ceṉāpatippiriyaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 24.136 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
